---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which area does this affect?

- [ ] AI Agents (pipeline, prompts, LLM models)
- [ ] Visual Canvas (nodes, wires, layout)
- [ ] Image Generation (models, quality, reference images)
- [ ] Video Generation (models, modes, controls)
- [ ] Audio (voiceover, music, talking-head)
- [ ] Project Management (save, load, folders, export)
- [ ] UI/UX (design, animations, responsiveness)
- [ ] Backend/API (endpoints, performance, storage)
- [ ] Docker/Deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
